ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., ge, language) */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units the course is worth */,
  "lec_lab" TEXT /* Lecture or lab format of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the semester belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the semester (e.g., active, upcoming, past) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester the course is being offered in */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Section number of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is offered */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the course offering */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "academic_standing" TEXT /* Academic standing of the student (e.g., good standing, probation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is enrolling in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree requirement */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., course, GPA) */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours required for the degree */,
  "required_courses" TEXT /* List of specific courses required for the degree */,
  "gpa_requirement" REAL /* Minimum GPA required for the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degree_requirements_degree_name FOREIGN KEY ("degree_name") REFERENCES student_degrees ("degree_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is the prerequisite */,
  "min_grade" TEXT /* Minimum grade required in the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_equivalencies" (
  "equivalency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course equivalency */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has the equivalency */,
  "equivalent_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is equivalent */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the equivalent course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equivalency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_equivalencies_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_equivalencies_equivalent_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("equivalent_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student degree */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student pursuing the degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the degree (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the degree was completed */,
  "gpa_at_completion" REAL /* GPA at the time of degree completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_degrees_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpa_records" (
  "gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student for the semester */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpa_records_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpa_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
